messages.content: (Born) My daughter _______ on May 5, 2010.
My daughter was born on May 5, 2010.
(Run) Jerry _______ several marathon races this year.
Jerry ran several marathon races this year.
(Send) I thought my father _______ the money.
I thought my father sent the money.
. (Hide) I _______ behind the bushes but the children were still able to find me.
I hid behind the bushes but the children were still able to find me.
Rewrite sentence from direct to reported (indirect) speech: Bella: "It is too late to apologize to me!"
Bella said that it was too late to apologize to her.
. Ross: “You will meet my parents at the picnic next week.”
Ross said that I would meet his parents at the picnic the following week.
Bill: “When did the game start?”
Bill asked when the game had started.
Douglas: "How long has Liz been attending MPU?"
Douglas asked how long Liz had been attending MPU.
.Tina: "I have been watching an exciting Kdrama."
Tina said that she had been watching an exciting Kdrama.
Mother: "Have something to eat before you leave."
The mother told me to have something to eat before I left.
Wife: "What do you want for dinner?"
The wife asked what I wanted for dinner.
Teacher: "Can you give me the book by the table?"
The teacher asked if I could give them the book by the table.
